case_title: KEVIN O'CONNOR VS. CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,577.19 FILED BY O'CONNOR, KEVIN AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-29-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0) SERVED DEC-30-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-29-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-29-2009 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-29-2009 - JUDGMENT. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, 506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF O'CONNOR, KEVIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $2,768.60 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,843.60, (THE COURT ASSESSES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $5,537.19, AND ATTRIBUTES 50% COMPARITIVE FAULT TO EACH PARTY. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD.) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, RETURNED, SENT TO CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED.
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR O'CONNOR, KEVIN ASSIGNED TO HOWARD REED COMPANY, INC.
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: SUBSTITUTED FOR HOWARD, CHERYLANN AS ATTORNEY FOR HOWARD REED COMPANY, INC.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,199.77 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
